```python
import sys

def solve():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    N = int(data[0])
    A = list(map(int, data[1:]))
    
    for i in range(N - 1):
        if A[i] >= A[i + 1]:
            print("No")
            return
    print("Yes")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
```
